sources.title: Where East is East (MGM, 1929) LON CHANEY🍕LUPE VELEZ
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Presents CLASSIC MOVIE MONDAY
Stars: Lon Chaney, Lupe Vélez, Estelle Taylor
Director: Tod Browning
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLmHgXUJMN1TUzR3YhpzxOuBM6YrZ91UVG
🍕Presented with the original synchronized orchestral score and sound effects🍕
Step into the shadowy world of jungle intrigue and forbidden love in this intense pre-Code drama from Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer. Directed by the legendary Tod Browning, this atmospheric tale stars Lon Chaney as a fierce animal trapper whose troubled past collides with his daughter's future. Lupe Vélez delivers a fiery performance as the devoted daughter, while Estelle Taylor stuns as a dangerously seductive figure from their past.

Produced by Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer and set against a backdrop of Southeast Asian mystique, this film explores themes of obsession, betrayal, and the primal forces of nature and desire. With Browning’s signature blend of melodrama and menace, the story unfolds with emotional intensity and striking visual style. Chaney’s powerful presence and Vélez’s charm drive a narrative that remains riveting nearly a century later. 

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

Be sure to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more rare, vintage films every WEEK on PizzaFLIX.

TRIVIA: This is the 8th of eight films TOD BROWNING directed LON CHANEY for M-G-M between 1925 and ‘29.

#fullmovie #WhereEastIsEast #LonChaney #LupeVelez #TodBrowning #PreCode #MetroGoldwynMayer # synchronizedsound #SilentFilmEra #classicmoviemonday #pizzaflix

metadata.Plot: 'Tiger' Haynes is a respected trapper of jungle beasts for zoos and circuses and a doting father to his beautiful young daughter Toyo. When he finds out that she's fallen in love with Bobby Bailey, the son of a wealthy circus owner he frequently deals with, Haynes is initially suspicious of the young man's motives. However, Bailey's sincerity soon wins him over, and they take the river boat to Saigon together to see the young man's father. While on board Bobby meets the femme fatale cougar, Mme. de Sylva, who immediately desires the young man and easily seduces him. In reality, she is Toyo's mother and a notoriously predatory seductress. Tiger adamantly insinuates himself between de Sylva and her latest conquest and seemingly breaks up the romance and returns home to oversee Toyo and Bobby's wedding, but Toyo's mother unexpectedly arrives with the objective of vamping Bobby. In order to avoid having Toyo's heart broken by her mother, Tiger resorts to the 'law of the jungle.'
metadata.Writer: Tod Browning, Harry Sinclair Drago, Waldemar Young
metadata.Actors: Lon Chaney, Lupe Velez, Estelle Taylor
